blocks.body: Partitives (partitives) are constructions that help to "count" uncountable nouns: a piece of, a cup of, a glass of, a slice of, etc. They indicate a specific portion or unit of an uncountable noun.

{ "title": "11. Brief summary", "items": [ "Partitives are constructions for measuring uncountable nouns.", "A piece of is a universal partitive: cake, bread, advice, information, furniture.", "Drinks: a cup of (hot), a glass of (cold), a bottle of. of.", "Їжа: a slice of (скибка), a loaf of (буханка), a bar of (плитка).", "Контейнери: a box of, a can of, a jar of, a bag of, a packet of, a carton of.", "Measurements: a kilo of, a liter of, a pound of.", "Partitives are always used with of + an uncountable noun.", "In the plural, the partitive changes: two pieces of cake, three cups of coffee." ] }
